overview: The University of Hyderabad (UoH), popularly known as Hyderabad Central University (HCU), is a premier public central research university and an Institution of Eminence known for its strong research ecosystem, interdisciplinary education, and academic excellence.
accreditation: NAAC A+ Grade (Cycle 3) with a CGPA of 3.28/4.00.

placements.avgSalary: Integrated UG-PG: ₹7.30 LPA; 3-Year PG: ₹7.00 LPA; 2-Year PG: ₹6.75 LPA
placements.placementRate: MBA reached nearly 98% placement rate in 2023. Strong placements across technology and management domains.
placements.totalOffers: 550+ offers across 180+ organizations during 2024-25 placement season
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Deloitte, Oracle, Intel, Accenture, Novartis, ICICI Bank, GE, Teradata, Exim Bank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level entrance examinations followed by university counseling and selection procedures depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions generally follow CUET, GATE, and CAT counseling schedules along with the University of Hyderabad academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: One-time admission fees range approximately from ₹2,340 – ₹5,000 depending on the course. UoH is primarily a residential university.

scholarships.studentAidFund: Available for students with annual family income below ₹2 Lakhs.
scholarships.meritCumMeans: Scholarships available for Integrated and PG students based on merit and economic background.
scholarships.scstSupport: SC/ST students may receive hostel fee concessions and additional support.
scholarships.researchFellowships: Ph.D. scholars may receive JRF/SRF or university fellowships ranging from ₹8,000 – ₹31,000 per month.

contact.address: University of Hyderabad, Prof. C.R. Rao Road, Gachibowli, Hyderabad – 500046, Telangana, India
